title: QUICK & EASY 5 MINUTE MAKEUP TUTORIAL | Roxette Arisa
description:
This is a quick and easy 5 minute makeup tutorial that is a must for every girl. I'll be showing you a simple five minute makeup tutorial that I wear on a daily basis and it's sooo easy and quick that you'll have no problem creating this look even if you're running late.
